message:
fix(build): use wasm32-wasi target for full Node.js support in WASM

Change WASM target from freestanding to wasi so the same Zig polyfills
work in both native and WASM builds. std.fs/std.net automatically use
WASI syscalls when targeting wasi, and WAMR provides the WASI implementation.

Now both targets have full Node.js support:
- Native binary: polyfills → OS syscalls
- WASM: polyfills → WASI syscalls → WAMR
